readme_html:
Chat LLaMA

8bit-LoRA or 4bit-LoRA

Repository for training a LoRA for the LLaMA (1 and 2) models on HuggingFace with 8-bit or 4-bit quantization. Research only for LLaMA 1, LLaMA 2 is open commercially. 👉 Join our Discord Server for updates, support & collaboration

Dataset creation, training, weight merging, and quantization instructions are in the docs.

Check out our trained LoRAs on HuggingFace

Anthropic's HH

  • 7B
  • 13B
  • 30B
